name: The Dry State Comics: Dayro Edition
original_name: The Dry State Comics: Dayro Edition
overview: Time to take a detour back to the roots with the first-ever web series on Gujarati Lok Dayro! Performed and shot amid live audience, it features superstar artists- Mayabhai Ahir, Ghanshyam Lakhani, Jitubhai Dwarkawala & Hitesh Antala
